accuracy_notice.warning: Nahuatl orthography - MULTIPLE SYSTEMS EXIST, may not match sources
accuracy_notice.recommendation: Verify against INAH archives and scholarly editions
scholarly_sources: Sahagún, B. de (1577). Florentine Codex. (Dibble & Anderson trans., 1950-1982).
León-Portilla, M. (1956). La Filosofía Náhuatl. UNAM.
Bierhorst, J. (1985). Cantares Mexicanos: Songs of the Aztecs. Stanford University Press.
accuracy_notice.living_tradition_notice: Nahuatl is still spoken - consult INALI and native speakers
